product_surfaces: internal/cli/cli.go — options.helpRequested field captures --help/-h flag; parseOptions registers -h/--help BoolVar on per-command FlagSet; executeWithFactoryAndDeps checks helpRequested before service dispatch, calls printCommandHelp; executeLocalCommand checks helpRequested and dispatches printCommandHelp/printLocalSubcommandHelp; printHelp lists all registered commands; printCommandHelp renders per-command help for all 30+ commands; printLocalSubcommandHelp renders help for config init/locate/show, auth status, repo add/status

internal/cli/cli_test.go — TestCommandHelpExitsZero tests all service-backed commands --help exit 0; TestCommandHelpShortForm tests -h short form; TestLocalCommandHelpExitsZero tests local commands; TestLocalSubcommandHelpExitsZero tests subcommand-level help; TestAliasCommandHelpExitsZero tests alias commands; TestHelpDoesNotCreateService verifies no service factory call on --help; TestUnknownCommandErrors verifies unknown commands still error; TestAllCommandsRegistered verifies root --help lists all commands
cmd/gitcode-mcp/main.go — parseStartupArgs handles -h/--help at startup level, prints printStartupHelp; config/auth/doctor/migrate-cache local commands routed to cli.ExecuteWithSource
freshness: Current binary built in task directory, no live env vars, deterministic offline validation
